title: Onboarding - Translations
scenario: Verify that all text during the Onboarding flow is properly translated and displayed for each supported language.
steps: Start the app with a supported language.
Go through the entire Onboarding process, checking that all text is properly translated and displayed.
Repeat steps 1-2 for all supported languages.
expected: All text during the Onboarding flow is properly translated and displayed for each supported language.
